name: Luxfier Alpha Prototype
description: A nascent world where magic stirs and ancient powers awaken. Five factions vie for control while corruption spreads from the Abyss edge.

locations.name: Frozen Lake
locations.description: A pristine frozen expanse, revealed only in the depths of winter

npcs.name: Brother Theron
dialogue: Welcome, traveler. I am Brother Theron, healer and keeper of lore.
The Sacred Grove provides for those who respect its ways.
If you seek to aid our village, there is always work to be done.

default: Welcome, traveler. I am Brother Theron, healer and keeper of lore.
The Sacred Grove provides for those who respect its ways.
rain: Stay dry, friend! The rains can be treacherous.
Perfect weather for tending the medicinal herbs.
snow: Bitter cold today. I hope you're well-prepared.
Winter reveals the true nature of our resolve.
winter: The season of rest and reflection is upon us.
Many come to the shrine seeking warmth in winter.
quest_completed_herbs-for-the-healer: Thanks again for those herbs. They're already helping the village.
Your gathering effort saved many lives.

npcs.name: Smitty Ironhammer
dialogue: Ah, another adventurer seeks the forge!
Quality craftsmanship takes time and skill. You got coin?
I got weapons, armor, and custom runic infusions.

npcs.name: Sergeant Brynn
dialogue: Gate Sergeant, at your service. Keep the peace in Luminara.
No trouble here. We patrol regular-like.
Report any disturbances to the city guard.

quests.title: Herbs for the Healer
quests.description: Brother Theron needs rare herbs from Thornwood Depths to prepare medicines for the village. Gather the required plants and return safely.

quests.title: Shadows in the Thornwood
quests.description: Corrupted creatures have been spotted deeper in the forest. Investigate the source and report back to Brother Theron.

quests.title: The Forge Awakens
quests.description: Smitty Ironhammer wants to test your crafting potential. Gather iron ore from nearby caverns and forge your first weapon.

quests.title: Midnight Offering
quests.description: Brother Theron requests a sacred offering at the Moonwell Shrine at the stroke of midnight. The ritual is only potent during those hallowed hours.

essenceAltars.name: Moonwell Sacred Altar
essenceAltars.description: A mystical altar thrumming with ancient power. The dual moons are reflected in the crystal waters below. Here, essence can be reshaped.

essenceAltars.name: Thornwood Essence Stone
essenceAltars.description: A weathered stone covered in twisted thorns and glowing runes. Wild magic crackles around it. Morphing here is more dangerous but addictive.

essenceAltars.name: Forge Resonance Anvil
essenceAltars.description: An ancient anvil glowing with forge-fire. It pulses with rhythmic resonance. Dwarven craftsmanship at its finest. Morphing is methodical and controlled here.

epoch_i_fracture.name: Epoch I: Fracture
epoch_i_fracture.description: The Cataclysm has just ended. Civilization struggles to rebuild. Five factions rise to prominence, competing for influence.

epoch_ii_waning.name: Epoch II: Waning Light
epoch_ii_waning.description: 200 years have passed. The brief recovery fades. Ancient evils stir. One faction dominates politics as others fragment.

thornwood-depths.name: Thornwood Depths - Corrupted
thornwood-depths.description: The woods are now twisted by dark magic. Many adventurers never return.

frozen-lake.name: Frozen Lake - Cursed
frozen-lake.description: The ice never melts. Whispers echo across its surface.

brother-theron.description: The spirit of the legendary Brother Theron, long since passed

smitty-ironhammer.name: Smitty Ironhammer (Aged)
dialogue: Ah, another seeks the old forge... times have been darker of late.
Few come to the summit anymore. The world has gone to shadow.

herbs-for-the-healer.note: Brother Theron no longer needs herbs; he walks between worlds

epoch_iii_twilight.name: Epoch III: Twilight's End
epoch_iii_twilight.description: The final age dawns. Only the Shadow Conclave stands strong. Reality itself fractures. This is the last hope for salvation.

eldergrove-village.name: Eldergrove Village - Ruins
eldergrove-village.description: Once vibrant, now only ruins remain. Spirits of the fallen drift through empty streets.

luminara-grand-market.name: Luminara - Occupied
luminara-grand-market.description: The Shadow Conclave has seized control. Markets now deal in forbidden artifacts.

forge-summit.name: Forge Summit - Overrun
forge-summit.description: The forge fires have been extinguished. Dark magic now permeates the stone.

moonwell-shrine.name: Moonwell Shrine - Desecrated
moonwell-shrine.description: The sacred waters run black. Something ancient has awakened within.

brother-theron.name: Spirit of Brother Theron
dialogue: I have watched across the ages. The time has come.

smitty-ironhammer.note: Passed away in Epoch II. Only memories remain.

sergeant-brynn.name: Commander Brynn - Shadow Enforcer
dialogue: The Shadow Conclave rules now. Resistance is futile.
Power flows to those wise enough to accept it.

epochTransform.name: Ancient Brother Theron
epochTransform.title: Keeper of Sacred Relics
epochTransform.description: Theron must be well over a hundred years old now. He moves slowly, but his eyes are still sharp with ancient wisdom.

epochTransform.name: Master Smithe Ironhammer
epochTransform.title: Legendary Craftsman
epochTransform.description: The blacksmith has become a master of his craft, known across the realm for weapons that never break.
dialogue_suffix: Aye, I'm still here. My forge has seen generations pass.
Quality never goes out of style, young one.

epochTransform.name: Captain Brynn
epochTransform.title: Commander of the Luminara Guard
epochTransform.description: Once a mere sergeant, Brynn has risen through the ranks to command the entire guard force of Luminara.
dialogue_suffix: I've been promoted. Responsibility weighs heavier than armor.
The city survives because of my leadership. I won't let it fall.

epochTransform.name: Spirit of Brother Theron
epochTransform.title: Eternal Guardian
epochTransform.description: Brother Theron has transcended mortality, becoming a protector spirit bound to the sacred grounds. He appears as a shimmering phantom.
dialogue_suffix: I am no longer of flesh, but my purpose endures.
The Sacred Grove needs guardians now more than ever.

epochTransform.name: Statue of Smitty Ironhammer
epochTransform.title: Monument to Craftsmanship
epochTransform.description: Once a living legend, Smitty was immortalized as a statue in the town square. Some say the statue's eyes follow you...
dialogue_suffix: [The statue stands silent, but its presence speaks volumes about a master smith's legacy.]

epochTransform.name: Ghost-Captain Brynn
epochTransform.title: Sentinel of the Twilight
epochTransform.description: Captain Brynn died defending Luminara from the encroaching darkness. Now her spirit guards the ruins, unable to rest while duty remains.
dialogue_suffix: The city fell. But I will not abandon my post.
If you seek to restore what was lost, I will aid you.
